home.title: Home Page
home.subtitle: Here are a few implementations of various visual / functional components for you to reuse in your apps.

card-example.title: Card component
card-example.content: Simple example of a UI component you could define. This card component takes a string title as a prop, and defines some nice default styles

card-lang.title: Change the language
card-lang.content: Change the language of the app using these buttons. Their respective handlers will call for i18n to change the current language-code.

icons.title: Icons
icons.subtitle: Here are some icons and their corresponding implementations :
